problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
